name: adjudant
description: Obsidian vault editor and project initializer. One command, /adjudant, with seven verbs: connect, port, sync, check, tidy, ramasse, draw. Locked three-tier cleanup model: tidy = surface mechanical (routine), ramasse = deep structural (sparing), dream = content/knowledge/memory refresh (semantic, v0.4+). Enforces vault standards; pairs with hookify and Gemineye.
